title: ContextBundle
description: A user-reviewed immutable multi-source context bundle. Per R4 decisions: scoring_strategy=content-hash-v1 (no embeddings), 12000 token cost ceiling with active compaction, mandatory Phase 3 review gate.

schema_version.description: Pinned to 1.0.0 for v1. Schema changes require version bump.

bundle_id.description: ULID format: 26 chars, Crockford base32, time-ordered.

items.description: Collected context items. Empty array allowed only for fully-gapped bundles.

gaps.description: What couldn't be collected and why. Per F-1 regression: errors are first-class, never silent.

hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON of items[]. Replay determinism guarantee per Boundary 4.

cost_tokens.description: Sum of token cost across all items. Subject to cost_budget hard cap.

cost_budget.description: Locked default per Section 0 #3. Active compaction at >=10000; abort at >=12000.

scoring_strategy.description: Per R4 NR-2: deterministic ranking only in v1. Future strategies opt-in via this field.

consumed_bundle_id.description: Set by downstream skill at consumption time (sidecar wrapper integration). Optional.
